name: Spotted Dairy Cow
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a friendly spotted dairy cow standing in profile, big patches across its body, a gentle face with large eyes and floppy ears, small curved horns, a bell on a collar, and an udder, four hooved legs and a tufted tail

name: Cute Baby Calf
subject: animals/cow
prompt: an adorable baby calf with wobbly thin legs and knobby knees, a big round head, oversized sparkly eyes and long lashes, large floppy ears, a few soft spots on its body, and a short happy tail

name: Grazing Cow in the Pasture
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a calm cow lowering its head to munch grass in a meadow, tufts of grass and a few flowers at its hooves, a low fence and a couple of clouds and a round sun behind it

name: Shaggy Highland Cow
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a fluffy highland cow with long wavy shaggy hair hanging over its eyes, wide sweeping curved horns, a fringe of hair on its forehead, a stocky body and a long bushy tail, looking cheerful

name: Cow Face Close-Up
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a big friendly close-up portrait of a cow's head filling the frame, large gentle eyes with long lashes, a wide soft muzzle with two round nostrils, floppy ears sticking out to the sides, and short horns on top

name: Sturdy Bull
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a strong sturdy bull standing firmly, a thick muscular neck and broad chest, a ring in its nose, two big curved horns, a tuft of hair between the horns, and a long swishing tail, a confident expression

name: Mama Cow and Calf
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a gentle mother cow standing beside her little calf, the mother lowering her head to nuzzle the calf's cheek, both with soft spots and loving expressions, a few tufts of grass beneath them

name: Cow Resting in the Field
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a content cow lying down with its legs tucked underneath, chewing peacefully, surrounded by grass and a few daisies, a barn and a tree in the background

name: Cow Jumping Over the Moon
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a playful cartoon cow leaping through the night sky with legs stretched out, a big crescent moon behind it, scattered stars all around, a joyful grin on its face

name: Cow with Sunflowers
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a happy spotted cow standing among tall sunflowers, a flower tucked behind one ear, big bright eyes, a bell around its neck, with leaves and a couple of bees floating nearby

name: Toddler Easy Cow
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a very simple chunky cartoon cow with a big round body, large blank areas, a smiling face, two little dot eyes, tiny ears and horns, and short stubby legs, extra easy with few details

name: Cow in the Barnyard
subject: animals/cow
prompt: a cheerful cow standing in front of a barn with a hay bale and a wooden trough beside it, a chicken at its feet and a fence behind, a tree to one side, a bright friendly farm scene
